$comment: Alfred -> Cursor/Claude MCP source of truth. Template only: ${env:VAR} placeholders are resolved from Alfred's .env (or machine env) by Provision-Cursor.ps1. Keys starting with _ are metadata used by the provisioner and are stripped before anything is written. NEVER put real tokens in this file.

github._note: GitHub repos, PRs, issues, code search. Token read from GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN or, as a fallback, GITHUB_TOKEN (what Alfred's installer writes to .env).

playwright._note: Browser automation - navigate, fill forms, screenshot, reproduce UI bugs. No key needed.

context7._note: Up-to-date, version-specific library docs injected into context. Works without a key; a key raises rate limits.

excel._note: Read/write live open Excel workbooks. Auto-skipped if python (with excellm) is not on PATH.

markitdown._note: Microsoft MarkItDown - converts PDF, Office docs, images, audio, HTML and more to clean Markdown for LLM ingestion. No key needed. Auto-skipped if uvx is not on PATH.
